metering_unit_gloss: A verdict is one classification Postrule logs to your account — feeds your report card and the cohort.

tiers.label: Free
tiers.headline: One product, two deployment modes. Run Postrule locally; use the cloud as your audit layer.
tiers.key_features: Local primitive (Apache 2.0 SDK + BSL 1.1 analyzer) + cloud dashboard, 7-day retention, BYOK judge config, GitHub OAuth, hard-capped
tiers.upgrade_summary: Free covers self-hosted runs and the hosted audit layer at 10K verdicts/mo. Upgrade to Pro for cohort-tuned BYOK judge orchestration, audit-chain export, and 250K verdicts/mo.

tiers.label: Pro
tiers.headline: For teams shipping their first production gates — cohort-tuned BYOK judge, audit-chain export, no per-seat fees.
tiers.key_features: Cohort-tuned BYOK judge orchestration, audit-chain export (CFO-shippable), unlimited dashboard users, 30-day retention, priority email support
tiers.upgrade_summary: Pro adds the BYOK judge orchestration layer (cohort-tuned prompts + audit-chain export) on top of Free, with 25× the verdict cap and unlimited dashboard users.

tiers.label: Scale
tiers.headline: For ML platforms running at real volume.
tiers.key_features: Everything in Pro, plus 90-day retention, webhooks, SSO, priority email
tiers.upgrade_summary: Scale adds webhooks, SSO, and 90-day retention to Pro, with 20× the verdict cap for high-volume ML platforms.

tiers.label: Business
tiers.headline: For teams ready to underwrite the certifications roadmap.
tiers.key_features: Everything in Scale, plus 1-year retention, SOC 2 Type 1 target Q4 2026, 99.9% SLA, BAA on request, dedicated Slack
tiers.upgrade_summary: Business adds the SOC 2 readiness roadmap, 99.9% SLA, on-request BAA, and dedicated Slack to Scale, with a 5× verdict cap for regulated workloads.

tiers.label: Enterprise — Financial Services
tiers.headline: Industry-specific deployments for regulated work.
tiers.upgrade_summary: Enterprise adds industry-tuned configuration and design-partner pricing for regulated financial-services deployments.

tiers.label: Enterprise — Healthcare
tiers.headline: Industry-specific deployments for regulated work.
tiers.upgrade_summary: Enterprise adds industry-tuned configuration and design-partner pricing for regulated healthcare deployments.

tiers.label: Enterprise — SOC / Security
tiers.headline: Industry-specific deployments for regulated work.
tiers.upgrade_summary: Enterprise adds industry-tuned configuration and design-partner pricing for regulated SOC/security deployments.

tiers.label: Enterprise — Government
tiers.headline: Industry-specific deployments for regulated work.
tiers.upgrade_summary: Enterprise adds industry-tuned configuration and design-partner pricing for regulated government deployments.

tiers.label: Pro Services
tiers.headline: Decoupled from license; fixed-price packages also available.
tiers.upgrade_summary: Pro Services is decoupled from the license — engagement-priced packages from $35K–$150K.
